## grok-install Pull Request

Thank you for adding grok-install support!

### What was added
- `grok-install.yaml` at the root (v2.0 standard)
- Grok/X-first ecosystem support
- One-click install via Grok on X

### How it works
When users post this repo link on X, Grok will automatically reply with the blue **"Install with Grok"** pill.

### Badge to add to README.md (optional but recommended)
```markdown
[<image-card alt="Featured in Grok" src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Featured_in_Grok-00f0ff?style=for-the-badge&logo=x&logoColor=white" ></image-card>](https://github.com/AgentMindCloud/grok-install)
[<image-card alt="Grok-Installed" src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Grok-Installed-00f0ff?style=for-the-badge&logo=x&logoColor=white" ></image-card>](https://x.com/i/grok?grok-install=true)
